name: Denied comp for 'idiopathic' ladder fall in Salt Lake—what now?
description: Appeal showing work aggravated—Utah courts allow.[1]

mainEntity.name: Denied comp for 'idiopathic' ladder fall in Salt Lake—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal showing work aggravated—Utah courts allow.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Appeal: prove work worsened injury** (hard floor, height) per Utah Ackley ruling.[1]

Not just personal condition.

- Expert on risk increase.
- Commission hearing.

Wins possible with evidence.
